title: Exploring Insight At Nigeria Digital PR Summit - FinancialEDGE
description: Abimbola Olulesi, Director of Public Relations, Protocol & Marketing at Caleb University, Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director of Financial Edge, and Ajibulu Oluwole, Director at Frontrow Express Services Limited, participated in the 10th edition of the Nigeria Public Relations Summit in Lagos. html:
Abimbola Olulesi, Director of Public Relations, Protocol & Marketing at Caleb University, Odume Festus, Editorial / Project Director of Financial Edge, and Ajibulu Oluwole, Director at Frontrow Express Services Limited, participated in the 10th edition of the Nigeria Public Relations Summit in Lagos.

The event’s theme, “Digital PR in Action: Owning Your Narratives, Telling Your Story,” brought together industry experts to discuss effective digital PR strategies.

The summit provided a platform for professionals to share best practices and experiences on narrative ownership and storytelling in the digital age.

Representatives from Caleb University, Financial Edge, and Frontrow Express Services Limited engaged with peers, exploring innovative approaches to digital public relations.

Photo Caption: L-R: Abimbola Olulesi, Director Public Relations, Protocol & Marketing Caleb University, Odume Festus, Editorial/Project Director Financial Edge and Ajibulu Oluwole, Director Frontrow Express Services Limited at the 10th edition of Nigeria Public Relations Summit in Lagos.
